case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. VICTORIA LAYMOND WAN

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT WAN, VICTORIA LAYMOND
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-09-2021 - JUDGMENT. (MATTER PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON JUNE 9, 2021)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-09-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-09-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF CCSF, REPRESENTED BY GRACE GLENN, CLAIMS ADJUSTER IS PRESENT. MICHAEL D. KIRCHANSKI (SFMTA) TESTIFIES ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT VICTORIA LAYMOND WAN IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF VIDEO EXHIBITS ARE VIEWED VIA SHARE SCREEN ON ZOOM. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITED TO THE COURT PRIOR TO TODAY'S HEARING ARE REVEIWED IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WAN, VICTORIA LAYMOND STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
